Skills: Java | Restful API | Mobile Development | Kotlin | Android Development
Kualifikasi_Persyaratan: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent experience | 3–5 years of experience as an Android Developer | Strong proficiency in Kotlin | Solid experience with Android SDK, Android Studio, and Gradle | Strong understanding of MVVM architecture and clean architecture principles | Experience with RESTful APIs, JSON, and third-party integrations | Proficient in Git version control | Experience with Room Database / SQLite | Strong knowledge of Android lifecycle, UI components, and performance optimization | Familiarity with unit testing and debugging techniques | Nice to Have | Experience with Jetpack Compose | Familiarity with Dependency Injection (Hilt / Dagger) | Experience with CI/CD pipelines | Knowledge of Firebase (Crashlytics, Analytics, FCM) | Experience publishing and maintaining apps on the Google Play Store | Soft Skills | Strong analytical and problem-solving skills | Effective communication and collaboration | Ability to work independently and in agile teams | High attention to detail and code quality
Deskripsi_Pekerjaan:
We are looking for an experienced Android Developer with 3–5 years of hands-on experience in Kotlin to develop and maintain high-quality mobile applications. The candidate will play a key role in building scalable, robust, and user-centric Android solutions while collaborating closely with cross-functional teams.
Responsibililties
Design, develop, and maintain Android applications using Kotlin
Architect and implement scalable, maintainable, and high-performance mobile solutions
Collaborate with product managers, designers, and backend teams to deliver new features
Ensure code quality through best practices, code reviews, and testing
Optimize application performance, responsiveness, and memory usage
Integrate RESTful APIs and manage data efficiently
Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues
Contribute to technical decisions, architecture design, and improvements
Write and maintain technical documentation
Stay updated with the latest Android development trends and technologies
